data.description: BREAKING: UAE decides to exit OPEC and OPEC+

data.title: Bitcoin's fate tied to $82K CME Gap amid earnings, FOMC uncertainty. Tech earnings, FOMC affect investor risk, $82K crucial for Bitcoin upswing.
data.description: Strong performances by major technology companies and the Federal Open Market Committee (FOMC) decisions are creating uncertainty among investors, impacting risk tolerance. Bitcoin's potential recovery rally hinges on surpassing $82,000, a critical level for its trajectory.

data.title: CirrusMD Redefines the Point of Care: Immediate, Physician-First, Continuous, and Connected
data.description: CirrusMD, a Quantum Health subsidiary based in Dublin, Ohio, has introduced a novel approach to virtual primary care, aiming to reach patients at an earlier stage in their healthcare journey. The new model goes beyond traditional care delivery methods by emphasizing the importance of initial interactions, with significant potential to lower healthcare expenses and enhance outcomes for both employers and individuals. Research indicates that approximately 33% of Americans face challenges in accessing regular healthcare services, leading to soaring costs across the healthcare system.

data.title: Q4 Launches AI-Native CRM, Transforming How Investor Relationships Are Managed
data.description: In Toronto, Q4 Inc. announced the introduction of AI-native CRM features in its investor relations platform. This development signifies a significant change in how public companies handle and utilize investor engagement data. Through this update, IR teams can now streamline tasks such as data entry and reporting, enabling them to access real-time insights. This allows for better meeting preparation, tailored engagement strategies, and improved communication with investors.

data.title: AmplifAI and TTEC Collaborate to Advance AI-Driven Performance Through TTEC Perform™
data.description: A technology company based in Plano, Texas, has announced that their AI-driven platform for automated quality assurance, coaching, and customer experience management is now being utilized by TTEC Perform™ on a large scale. The platform provided by AmplifAI aims to streamline processes and improve performance across various business sectors utilizing advanced technologies.

data.title: Tyfone Expands Check Fraud Protection Capabilities with Mitek Systems’ Check Fraud Defender
data.description: A company based in Portland, Oregon, Tyfone, has recently announced the enhancement of their check fraud protection services by integrating Mitek Systems’ Check Fraud Defender. This collaboration aims to bolster the capabilities of Tyfone in preventing check fraud incidents. With this new system in place, Tyfone is expected to offer improved security measures to its clients.
BREAKING: The UAE will leave OPEC and OPEC+ as of May 1 - State News Agency.

data.title: Stem Acquires raicoon to Expand PowerTrack Capabilities
data.description: In Houston, Stem, Inc. (NYSE: STEM) revealed the acquisition of raicoon GmbH's software assets, a company from Vienna specializing in automated fault detection for solar asset performance. This move is set to boost Stem's PowerTrack™ platform by advancing data analysis for operational efficiency. Stem aims to improve customer ability to recognize, prioritize, and address performance issues through this acquisition.

data.title: Sonida Senior Living Publishes Letter to Shareholders in Connection with 2026 Annual Meeting
data.description: Dallas-based Sonida Senior Living, Inc. (NYSE: SNDA), a prominent owner, operator, and investor in senior living communities, has released its definitive proxy materials for the upcoming 2026 Annual Meeting of Stockholders. The meeting is set to take place on June 11, 2026. The company has filed these materials with the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) and is also sending a letter to shareholders in connection with the meeting.

data.title: Imagine Pediatrics Earns Platinum Pinnacle Award for Excellence in Pediatric Care
data.description: Imagine Pediatrics, a leading pediatric medical group based in Nashville, Tennessee, has been recently recognized for their exceptional work in providing value-based care for children and youth with special health care needs. The company, known for its round-the-clock virtual and in-home care services, has gained prominence in the field. This acknowledgment comes amid the increasing importance of specialized healthcare for children, where Imagine Pediatrics stands as a prominent figure. The recognition signifies the company's success in delivering effective outcomes in this area.

data.title: Camden National Corporation Delivers Solid First Quarter 2026 Results with Net Income of $21.9 Million and Diluted EPS of $1.29
data.description: In Camden, Maine, on April 28, 2026, Camden National Corporation, listed as CAC on NASDAQ, disclosed a net income of $21.9 million with diluted earnings per share of $1.29 for the quarter ending on March 31, 2026. This performance yielded a return on average assets...

data.title: ADP National Employment Report Preliminary Estimate for April 28, 2026
data.description: In Roseland, New Jersey, on April 28, 2026, the NER Pulse reported that U.S. private employers added an average of 39,250 jobs per week for the four weeks leading up to April 11, 2026. This data is a part of the monthly ADP National Employment Report. The hiring trend showed a consistent increase in job additions, indicating positive growth in the job market.

data.title: Intellicheck To Announce First Quarter 2026 Financial Results on May 12, 2026
data.description: Melville, New York-based Intellicheck, Inc. (Nasdaq: IDN), a prominent identity verification company, is set to reveal their financial performance for the first quarter of 2026 on May 12, 2026, following the closure of the U.S. stock markets. The company will host an earnings conference call on the same day at 4:30 p.m. ET/1:30 p.m. PT to review their operational outcomes. For those interested in tuning in to the earnings conference call, further details on how to join will be provided.

data.title: eX² Technology Announces Long-Term Dark Fiber Agreement on Navajo County Middle-Mile Network, Strengthening Strategic Southwest Connectivity Corridor
data.description: eX² Technology has secured a 20-year agreement in Omaha, Nebraska, reinforcing their commitment to an Integrated Operations, Maintenance & Commercialization (OM&C) Model and Long-Term Infrastructure Partnership Approach. The agreement, signed on April 28, 2026, emphasizes eX²'s role as a comprehensive solution provider for infrastructure projects.

data.title: NexPoint Residential Trust, Inc. Announces Quarterly Dividend
data.description: In Dallas on April 28, 2026, NexPoint Residential Trust, Inc. (NYSE: NXRT) disclosed that its board of directors has sanctioned a dividend of $0.53 for each share of NXRT common stock. This dividend is set to be disbursed on June 30, 2026, to shareholders on record as of June 15, 2026.

data.title: Legacy Markets Acquires 10 PowerTrac Convenience Stores, Leading Expansion into South Carolina
data.description: A company known as Legacy Markets has increased its presence to 20 locations following its recent acquisition of 10 PowerTrac convenience and liquor stores. As part of this expansion, Legacy Markets is set to rebrand the PowerTrac stores as Triangle Stop. The move marks the company's entry into South Carolina and signifies a significant growth in its operations. The announcement was made in Hendersonville, N.C. on April 28, 2026.

data.title: Hormel Foods Announces 2026 Call for 10 Under 20 Food Heroes Nominations
data.description: A program is honoring individuals under the age of 20 who are making a difference by addressing food insecurity and systemic issues. Hormel Foods has launched a national search for the 2026 Food Heroes, looking to recognize 10 young leaders who are creatively tackling challenges in the food industry. This marks the fifth class of "10 Under 20 Food Heroes," with nominees needing to be under 20 years old to qualify.

Iran Minister of Education: 'Announced the martyrdom of 346 cultural figures and students, damage to more than 1,200 educational spaces, and the complete destruction of 20 educational units. He said: 775 damaged schools have been rebuilt and returned to the education cycle so far.'
